title: pancheria × lanceolata
intro: Pancheria × lanceolata, also known as the Lanceolate Pancheria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. Native to New Caledonia, it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits including wound healing, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory effects. Pancheria × lanceolata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
